title: oldenlandia maritima
intro: Oldenlandia maritima, also known as "white mullein" or "dragon's tongue", is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia maritima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Oldenlandia maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
